open.title: Vumatel installation and maintenance problems | Khayelitsha & Delft
open.description: We would like to inform you about the challenges that we are currently experiencing with installation & maintenance activities in the Khayelitsha and Delft areas, Western Cape. Due to increased violence in this area, our contractor partners are not able to freely access the area to work. All maintenance and installation activities in this area will be on hold until further notice. The safety of our contractor partners remains our priority.

updates.content: Delft will be put on hold due to hostility with local gangs. No maintenance and installations will take place. Contractors are not able to enter the area.

open.description: Vumatel is conducting maintenance in Robin Hills on 2026/04/13, 20:00 from 2026/04/17, 06:00. Users affected will experience limited to no connectivity during the maintenance window. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

closed.title: Afrihost Fibre Outage | National
closed.description: Afrihost network and system engineers are investigating the cause of no service for fibre clients. Affected clients are unable to get a DHCP lease. We apologise for the inconvenience caused.

updates.content: As we continue to monitor the network stability, we are seeing greatly improved connection times and traffic levels. If you are still experiencing an outage, please contact our support team for assistance. We apologise for the issues experienced.
We are monitoring the network for stability while we see improvements in connection times and traffic levels. We apologise for the issues experienced.
Afrihost teams are still working to restore services. We are observing improved traffic levels.
Afrihost engineers are actively troubleshooting the issue affecting fibre clients. We apologise for the inconvenience caused.
